descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 7-3 to tie Centennial Cup semifinal series.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes scored five first-period goals in a 7-3 victory over the Red Deer Rustlers on April 15, 1987, squaring their western Centennial Cup semifinal series at three wins each. Rob Clarke scored three times, with Tony Bobbitt, Dave Tomlinson, Brian Kozak, and Mike McCormick adding single goals. The deciding game was set for that night in Red Deer.
